semantic.role: Diagnostic utility for analyzing rule block retention and dependency selection in prompt relevance processing within the ArchSpine infrastructure layer.
responsibilities: Extracts rule IDs from raw rule block text using regex pattern matching (via extractRuleId helper).
Builds diagnostics comparing raw and final rule data to identify retained and dropped rule blocks (buildRuleBlockDiagnostics).
Builds diagnostics for dependency selection by filtering retained candidates based on inclusion in final context data (buildDependencySelectionDiagnostics).
Provides structured diagnostic output for debugging prompt context trimming and relevance.
outOfScope: Actual splitting or parsing of rule blocks (delegated to splitRuleBlocks from trim.js).
Any mutation or application of rule data or dependency data.
User input validation or configuration handling.
invariants: This module only produces diagnostic information; it does not alter the rule or dependency data it receives.
Must not absorb service or engine orchestration concerns (per rule infra-facade-imports).
All exported functions are pure in the sense they only compute and return diagnostic structures.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide diagnostic metrics for monitoring the quality of prompt context trimming and dependency selection, enabling developers to debug context relevance issues in the ArchSpine runtime.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of the initial governance layer for the v1.0.0 release, delivering rule block and dependency diagnostics to support architectural governance.

English.role: Diagnostic utility for analyzing rule block retention and dependency selection in prompt relevance processing within the ArchSpine infrastructure layer.
responsibilities: Extracts rule IDs from raw rule block text using regex pattern matching.
Builds diagnostics comparing raw and final rule data to identify retained and dropped rule blocks.
Builds diagnostics for dependency selection by filtering retained candidates based on inclusion in final context data.
Provides structured diagnostic output for debugging prompt context trimming and relevance.
outOfScope: Actual splitting or parsing of rule blocks (delegated to splitRuleBlocks from trim.js).
Any mutation or application of rule data or dependency data.
User input validation or configuration handling.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于分析规则块保留情况和依赖选择情况的诊断工具，位于 ArchSpine 基础设施层的提示上下文处理模块中。
responsibilities: 通过正则表达式从原始规则块文本中提取规则 ID（借助 extractRuleId 辅助函数）。
构建比较原始与最终规则数据的诊断结果，识别保留和丢弃的规则块（buildRuleBlockDiagnostics）。
基于依赖候选在最终上下文数据中的包含情况，构建依赖选择诊断结果（buildDependencySelectionDiagnostics）。
提供结构化的诊断输出，用于调试提示上下文裁剪和相关性问题。
outOfScope: 实际的规则块分割或解析逻辑（委托给 trim.js 中的 splitRuleBlocks）。
对规则数据或依赖数据的任何修改或应用。
用户输入验证或配置处理。

exports.name: buildDependencySelectionDiagnostics
exports.signature:
buildDependencySelectionDiagnostics(
  dependencyDiagnostics: ContextResolutionDiagnostics | undefined,
  finalContextData: string,
)
